name: council-of-high-intelligence
description: Multi-persona deliberation framework: 18 historical-thinker council members for structured analysis of complex decisions, with native MCP multi-provider routing.

claude-code.description: Claude (Anthropic) as a council provider via MCP. Enables Anthropic-affinity members to run on Claude models during multi-provider deliberation.

ollama.description: Local Ollama as a council provider via MCP. Enables privacy-preserving or offline deliberation for selected council seats.

settings.name: ROUTING_PROFILE
settings.description: Council MCP routing profile. 'auto' uses single Gemini model for all members. 'mcp-multi' distributes members across declared MCP servers per configs/mcp-provider-slots.yaml.

settings.name: MCP_SLOTS_PATH
settings.description: Path to a custom MCP provider slots YAML file. Defaults to the bundled configs/mcp-provider-slots.yaml.
